# SMARTReadData

**Instance Property**

Retrieves 512 byte device SMART data structure.

## Declaration

```swift
IOReturn (*SMARTReadData)(void *interface, ATASMARTData *data);
```

## Discussion

See section 8.54.5 of ATA/ATAPI-6. Will return an appropiate error if command can not be completed.
